        <term_definitions code="at0000">
            <items id="text">EPS Patient Summary</items>
            <items id="description">Generic document containing a summary of health information about an individual.</items>
        </term_definitions>
        <term_definitions code="at0001">
            <items id="text">Tree</items>
            <items id="description">@ internal @</items>
        </term_definitions>
        <term_definitions code="at0002">
            <items id="text">Extension</items>
            <items id="description">Additional information required to capture local content or to align with other reference models/formalisms.</items>
            <items id="comment">For example: local information requirements or additional metadata to align with FHIR or CIMI equivalents.</items>
        </term_definitions>
    </definition>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']">
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">Composition.section:sectionAllergies</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">This section documents the relevant allergies or intolerances for that patient, describing the kind of reaction - e.g. rash, anaphylaxis,.. - preferably the agents that cause it; and optionally the criticality and the certainty of the allergy. At a minimum, it should list currently active and any relevant historical allergies and adverse reactions. If no information about allergies is available, or if no allergies are known this should be clearly documented in the section.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">1..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.exclusion_global.v1]/data[at0001]/items[at0002, 'Global exclusion of adverse reactions']">
        <items id="mapTargetName">sectionAllergies.emptyReason</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">Composition.section:sectionAllergies.emptyReason</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">If the section is empty, why the list is empty. An empty section typically has some text explaining the empty reason.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..1</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHOULD be taken from ListEmptyReasons (preferred to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/list-empty-reason|4.0.1) If a section is empty, why it is empty.</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.absence.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0005]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">sectionAllergies.emptyReason</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">Composition.section:sectionAllergies.emptyReason</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">If the section is empty, why the list is empty. An empty section typically has some text explaining the empty reason.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..1</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHOULD be taken from ListEmptyReasons (preferred to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/list-empty-reason|4.0.1) If a section is empty, why it is empty.</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.container.v0]/data[at0001]/items[openEHR-EHR-CLUSTER.fhir_narrative.v0]/items[at0002]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">sectionAllergies.text</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">Composition.section:sectionAllergies.text</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">A human-readable narrative that contains the attested content of the section, used to represent the content of the resource to a human. The narrative need not encode all the structured data, but is required to contain sufficient detail to make it "clinically safe" for a human to just read the narrative.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">1..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">AllergyIntolerance</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Risk of harmful or undesirable, physiological response which is unique to an individual and associated with exposure to a substance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..*</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0002]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">code</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.code</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Code for an allergy or intolerance statement (either a positive or a negated/excluded statement). This may be a code for a substance or pharmaceutical product that is considered to be responsible for the adverse reaction risk (e.g., "Latex"), an allergy or intolerance condition (e.g., "Latex allergy"), or a negated/excluded code for a specific substance or class (e.g., "No latex allergy") or a general or categorical negated statement (e.g., "No known allergy", "No known drug allergies"). Note: the substance for a specific reaction may be different from the substance identified as the cause of the risk, but it must be consistent with it. For instance, it may be a more specific substance (e.g. a brand medication) or a composite product that includes the identified substance. It must be clinically safe to only process the 'code' and ignore the 'reaction.substance'. If a receiving system is unable to confirm that AllergyIntolerance.reaction.substance falls within the semantic scope of AllergyIntolerance.code, then the receiving system should ignore AllergyIntolerance.reaction.substance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHOULD be taken from Allergies & Intolerances - IPS (preferred to http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/ValueSet/allergies-intolerances-uv-ips) Type of the substance/product, allergy or intolerance condition or a code for absent/unknown allergy.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">1..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0130]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">clinicalStatus</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.clinicalStatus</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">The clinical status of the allergy or intolerance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHALL be taken from AllergyIntoleranceClinicalStatusCodes (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-clinical|4.0.1) The clinical status of the allergy or intolerance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0063]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">verificationStatus</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.verificationStatus</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Assertion about certainty associated with the propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance (including pharmaceutical product).</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHALL be taken from AllergyIntoleranceVerificationStatusCodes (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-verification|4.0.1) Assertion about certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0101]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">criticality</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.criticality</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Estimate of the potential clinical harm, or seriousness, of the reaction to the identified substance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHALL be taken from AllergyIntoleranceCriticality (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-criticality|4.0.1) Estimate of the potential clinical harm, or seriousness, of a reaction to an identified substance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0120]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">category</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.category</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Category of the identified substance.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetBindings">The codes SHALL be taken from AllergyIntoleranceCategory (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-category|4.0.1) Category of an identified substance associated with allergies or intolerances.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..*</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0117]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">lastOccurrence</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.lastOccurrence</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Represents the date and/or time of the last known occurrence of a reaction event.</items>
        <items id="mapTargetCardinality">0..1</items>
    </annotations>
    <annotations path="[openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1]/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]/data[at0001]/items[at0133]">
        <items id="mapTargetName">onset[x]</items>
        <items id="mapTargetFhirPath">AllergyIntolerance.onset[x]</items>
        <items id="mapTargetDefinition">Estimated or actual date, date-time, or age when allergy or intolerance was identified.</items>

grammar: FHIRConnect/v1.0.0
type: model
metadata:
  name: COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1
  version: 0.0.1-alpha
spec:
  system: FHIR
  version: R4
  openEhrConfig:
    archetype: openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1
    revision: 1.0.3
  fhirConfig:
    structureDefinition: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Composition

mappings:
  - name: meta
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.meta"
      openehr: "$composition"
    manual:
      - name: "profile"
        fhir:
          - path: "profile"
            value: "http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Composition-uv-ips"

  - name: title
    with:
      fhir: "$resource"
      openehr: "$composition"
    manual:
      - name: "title"
        fhir:
          - path: "title"
            value: "Patient Summary"

  - name: status
    with:
      fhir: "$resource"
      openehr: "$composition"
    manual:
      - name: "status"
        fhir:
          - path: "status"
            value: "final"

  - name: type
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.type.coding"
      openehr: "$composition"
    manual:
      - name: "code"
        fhir:
          - path: "code"
            value: "60591-5"
      - name: "system"
        fhir:
          - path: "system"
            value: "http://loinc.org"
      - name: "display"
        fhir:
          - path: "display"
            value: "Patient summary Document"

  - name: "sectionAllergiesAndIntolerances"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.section"
      openehr: "$composition/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Allergies']"
    slotArchetype: "SECTION.adhoc.v1_allergies_and_intolerances"
    fhirCondition:
      targetRoot: "$resource.section"
      targetAttribute: "code.coding.code"
      operator: "one of"
      criteria: "48765-2"

  - name: "sectionProblems"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.section"
      openehr: "$composition/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Problems']"
    slotArchetype: "SECTION.adhoc.v1_problems"
    fhirCondition:
      targetRoot: "$resource.section"
      targetAttribute: "code.coding.code"
      operator: "one of"
      criteria: "11450-4"

#  - name: "sectionMedications"
#    with:
#      fhir: "$resource.section"
#      openehr: "$composition/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EHDS Medication Summary']"
#    slotArchetype: "SECTION.adhoc.v1_medication_summary"
#    fhirCondition:
#      targetRoot: "$resource.section"
#      targetAttribute: "code.coding.code"
#      operator: "one of"
#      criteria: "10160-0"
#
  - name: "sectionMedicalDevices"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.section"
      openehr: "$composition/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS Medical Devices']"
    slotArchetype: "SECTION.adhoc.v1_medical_devices"
    fhirCondition:
      targetRoot: "$resource.section"
      targetAttribute: "code.coding.code"
      operator: "one of"
      criteria: "46264-8"

  - name: "sectionProcedures"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.section"
      openehr: "$composition/content[openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1 and name/value='EPS History of Procedures']"
    slotArchetype: "SECTION.adhoc.v1_procedures"
    fhirCondition:
      targetRoot: "$resource.section"
      targetAttribute: "code.coding.code"
      operator: "one of"
      criteria: "47519-4"

grammar: FHIRConnect/v1.0.0
type: model
metadata:
  name: SECTION.adhoc.v1_allergies_and_intolerances
  version: 0.0.1-alpha
spec:
  system: FHIR
  version: R4
  openEhrConfig:
    archetype: openEHR-EHR-SECTION.adhoc.v1
  fhirConfig:
    structureDefinition: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BackboneElement

mappings:


  - name: "entry"
    with:
      fhir: "entry"
      openehr: "$reference/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]"
    reference:
      resourceType: "AllergyIntolerance"
      mappings:
        - name: "allergy"
          with:
            fhir: "$fhirRoot"
            openehr: "$archetype/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2]"
          slotArchetype: "EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2"

  - name: "title"
    with:
      fhir: "$fhirRoot"
      openehr: "$composition"
    manual:
      - name: "manualTitle"
        fhir:
          - path: "title"
            value: "Allergies and Intolerances"

  - name: "code"
    with:
      fhir: "code.coding"
      openehr: "$composition"
    manual:
      - name: "manualSystem"
        fhir:
          - path: "system"
            value: "http://loinc.org"
      - name: "manualCode"
        fhir:
          - path: "code"
            value: "48765-2"
      - name: "manualDisplay"
        fhir:
          - path: "display"
            value: "Allergies and adverse reactions Document"

  # emptyReason: absence of information (patient unconscious, no data available)
  - name: "emptyReasonAbsence"
    with:
      fhir: "emptyReason"
      openehr: "$archetype/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.absence.v2]"
    fhirCondition:
      targetRoot: "$resource"
      targetAttribute: "emptyReason.coding.code"
      operator: "not of"
      criteria: "nilknown"
    slotArchetype: "EVALUATION.absence.v2"

  # emptyReason: global exclusion (no known allergies)
  - name: "emptyReasonExclusion"
    with:
      fhir: "emptyReason"
      openehr: "$archetype/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.exclusion_global.v1]"
    openehrCondition:
      targetRoot: "$archetype"
      targetAttribute: "items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.exclusion_global.v1]/data[at0001]/items[at0002]"
      operator: "not empty"
    fhirCondition:
      targetRoot: "$resource"
      targetAttribute: "emptyReason.coding.code"
      operator: "one of"
      criteria: "nilknown"
    slotArchetype: "EVALUATION.exclusion_global.v1"

  - name: "narrativeToOpenEhr"
    unidirectional: "fhir->openehr"
    with:
      fhir: "text"
      openehr: "$archetype/items[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.container.v0]/data[at0001]/items[openEHR-EHR-CLUSTER.fhir_narrative.v0]"
    followedBy:
      mappings:
        - name: "div"
          with:
            fhir: "div"
            openehr: "items[at0002]"
        - name: "status"
          with:
            fhir: "$fhirRoot"
            openehr: "items[at0001]"
          manual:
            - name: "manualNarrativeStatus"
              openehr:
                - path: "$openehrRoot"
                  value: "generated"

  - name: "narrativeText"
    with:
      fhir: "text"
      openehr: "$composition"
    mappingCode: "generateNarrative(entry, allergies)"
    unidirectional: "openehr->fhir"

grammar: FHIRConnect/v1.0.0
type: model
metadata:
  name: EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2
  version: 0.0.1-alpha
spec:
  system: FHIR
  version: R4
  openEhrConfig:
    archetype: openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2
    revision: 1.4.1
  fhirConfig:
    structureDefinition: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/AllergyIntolerance

terminology:
  type: "local"
  conceptmap: "http://hl7.org/fhir/ConceptMap/eps-adverse-reaction-risk-fhirconnect"

mappings:
  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.agentOrAllergen
  - name: "substance"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.code"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0002]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.status — active/inactive clinical status
  - name: "clinicalStatus"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.clinicalStatus"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0130]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.certainty — verification status
  - name: "verificationStatus"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.verificationStatus"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0063]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.criticality
  - name: "criticality"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.criticality"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0101]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.category
  - name: "category"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.category"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0120]"
    terminology:
      type: "inline"
      mappings:
        - openehr:
            code: "Food"
          fhir:
            code: "food"
        - openehr:
            code: "Medication"
          fhir:
            code: "medication"
        - openehr:
            code: "Environment"
          fhir:
            code: "environment"
        - openehr:
            code: "Biologic"
          fhir:
            code: "biologic"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.onsetDate — onset of first reaction
  - name: "onsetDateTime"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.onset.as(DateTime)"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0133]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.lastOccurrence
  - name: "lastOccurrence"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.lastOccurrence"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0117]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.typeOfPropensity — reaction mechanism (allergy vs intolerance)
  - name: "typeOfPropensity"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.type"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0058]"
    terminology:
      type: "inline"
      mappings:
        - openehr:
            code: "Allergy"
          fhir:
            code: "allergy"
        - openehr:
            code: "Intolerance"
          fhir:
            code: "intolerance"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.note.text — comment/narrative
  - name: "description"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.note.text"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[at0006]"

  # EPSAllergyIntolerance.reaction — adverse reaction event cluster
  - name: "reaction"
    with:
      fhir: "$resource.reaction"
      openehr: "$archetype/data[at0001]/items[openEHR-EHR-CLUSTER.adverse_reaction_event.v1]"
    slotArchetype: "CLUSTER.adverse_reaction_event.v1"

    unidirectional: "openehr->fhir"

  template:
    id: "EPS Patient Summary"
  archetypes:
    - "COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1"
    - "SECTION.adhoc.v1_allergies_and_intolerances"
    - "SECTION.adhoc.v1_problems"
    - "SECTION.adhoc.v1_procedures"
    - "SECTION.adhoc.v1_medical_devices"
    - "SECTION.adhoc.v1_medication_summary"
    - "EVALUATION.adverse_reaction_risk.v2"
    - "CLUSTER.adverse_reaction_event.v1"
    - "EVALUATION.problem_diagnosis.v1"
    - "CLUSTER.clinical_evidence.v1-evidence"

    - "CLUSTER.anatomical_location.v1"
    - "CLUSTER.problem_qualifier.v2"
    - "ACTION.procedure.v1"

    - "CLUSTER.device.v1"
    - "EVALUATION.absence.v2"
    - "EVALUATION.exclusion_global.v1"
  start: "COMPOSITION.health_summary.v1"

item.name: openEHR flat to FHIR - EPS Patient Summary

exec: pm.test("Response is a FHIR Bundle", function () {

body.raw:
{
  "eps_patient_summary/category|code" : "433",
  "eps_patient_summary/category|terminology" : "openehr",
  "eps_patient_summary/category|value" : "event",
  "eps_patient_summary/context/start_time" : "2022-02-03T04:05:06",
  "eps_patient_summary/context/setting|terminology" : "openehr",
  "eps_patient_summary/context/setting|code" : "225",

exec: pm.test("Response is a flat openEHR composition", function () {
pm.test("Flat composition contains allergy data", function () {
